title: Aria the Scarlet Ammo Anime Gets New Short Anime for 15th Anniversary
content: Kadokawa announced on Wednesday that the Aria the Scarlet Ammo series will get a new short anime, in commemoration of the anime's 15th anniversary. More details for the short anime will be revealed at a later date.
author: ANN

title: Godzilla Minus Zero Film Presents 1st Teaser
content: TOHO presented the first teaser trailer for Godzilla Minus Zero , the new Godzilla film from Godzilla Minus One 's Takashi Yamazaki , on Wednesday. The teaser confirms that the sequel is set in 1949, two years after Godzilla Minus One .
author: ANN

title: Godzilla Minus One Sequel Debuts Awesome First Trailer (& Confirms Major Returns)
content: Godzilla Minus One is coming back with a new sequel later around the world later this year, and now Toho and GKIDS have officially dropped the first trailer showing off Godzilla Minus Zero .
author: ComicBook

title: Manga 'Black Channel' Gets TV Anime
content: A television anime adaptation of Satoshi Kisaichi 's Black Channel manga was announced by publishing company Shogakukan through the official Monthly CoroCoro Comic Twitter (now X) account on Tuesday, revealing an announcement visual (pictured).
author: MyAnimeList

title: 7 Coolest Overpowered Isekai Heroes (Ranked By Power Level)
content: Isekai is one of the biggest anime franchises out there today , and that means fans have been introduced to some of the strongest heroes as a result. Thanks to the fact that Isekai often fulfills the wishes of many of their fans, a lot of the standout anime releases have seen ordinary people being whisked away to…
author: ComicBook

title: Jujutsu Kaisen Fans Rank Gojo Satoru 2nd Among the Strongest (No. 1 Raises Eyebrows)
content: One of the most popular aspects of Jujutsu Kaisen is its enigmatic, cheerful, and charming sorcerer, Gojo Satoru. The blue-eyed sorcerer has captivated fans in many ways; however, one of the biggest reasons for his popularity is his strength.
author: ComicBook

title: flat's Natsu Aogiri Launches New Manga
content: The official X (formerly Twitter ) account for Mag Garden 's Mag Comi platform announced on Tuesday that flat manga artist Natsu Aogiri will launch a new series titled Enyakurukuru on the platform on April 21. The story follows the strange connection between a fragile high school boy and a suspicious young man.
author: ANN

title: 20 Years Later, This Is Still Cartoon Network’s Wildest Spinoff (& It Never Aired in the U.S.)
content: Cartoon Network is now celebrating the 20th anniversary for the wildest spinoff the channel has ever helped to produce, and it’s an anime that didn’t even get an official broadcast run in the United States after all this time.
author: ComicBook

title: Major Crunchyroll Isekai Suddenly Cancels Future Episode Release
content: One of the major Isekai anime franchises now airing its newest season with Crunchyroll has suddenly cancelled plans for a future episode coming later this May. The Spring 2026 anime schedule is now in full effect as fans have gotten to see all kinds of new episodes from some of their favorite franchises .
author: ComicBook

title: The King of the Dead at the Dark Palace Light Novels Get Manga
content: The May issue of Square Enix 's Shonen Gangan magazine confirmed on Saturday that Tsukikage 's The King of the Dead at the Dark Palace light novels has received a manga adaptation by Ishura artist Meguri on the Gangan Online platform in April. The series debuted on April 7.
author: ANN
